name: Multi-Tenant
description: Multi-tenancy for the document model: tenant registry, per-request tenant resolution (header, admin switcher cookie, or domain), and tenant-scoped content isolation. Off by default.
author: SonicJS Team

headerName.label: Tenant Header
headerName.description: Request header API clients use to select a tenant (validated against active tenants)

subdomainResolution.label: Subdomain Resolution
subdomainResolution.description: Resolve tenants from subdomains of the root domain (acme.example.com -> tenant 'acme')

rootDomain.label: Root Domain
rootDomain.description: Root domain for subdomain resolution, e.g. example.com (required when subdomain resolution is on)

permissions.tenants.manage: Manage tenants and switch the active tenant
